questionHtml: Once extracted, the purity of the metal can be assessed using ICP-MS. Suggest two advantages of using plasma technology rather than regular mass spectrometry.
markschemeHtml:
Any two of:
larger linear calibration  [✔]

«accurate» detection of multiple elements/metals [✔]

«accurate» detection of elements in low concentration  [✔]

temperature around 10 000 K atomises/ionises every material  [✔]

meta.title: Once extracted, the purity of the metal can be assessed using ICP-MS. Suggest two advantages of using plasma technology rather than regular mass spectrometry.
breadcrumbLabels: A.2 Metals and inductively coupled plasma (ICP) spectroscopy
